examples: Followed by a passionate lecture on the enfranchisement of women.
He wrote, There was much criticism of my support for the enfranchisement of women.
He demanded the enfranchisement of every white man no matter what his status education fortune or work.
Yet the rise of Shia power in Iraq may start to encourage demands for greater enfranchisement.
After the war, an electoral reform conference recommended a limited measure of women's enfranchisement.
